an2.11:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these two powers. What two? The power of reflection and the power of development.
an2.11:1.0.2: "And what is the power of development? The power of development is the power of trainees.For relying on the power of a trainee, one abandons lust, hatred, and delusion. Having abandoned lust, hatred, and delusion, one does not do anything unwholesome; one does not pursue anything bad. This is called the power of development.
